visualizations.title: Prime Number Conditions
visualizations.description: The exact conditions that define whether a number is prime.

steps.explanation: Primes must be greater than 1. This excludes 0 and 1.
Primes have exactly two positive factors: 1 and the number itself.

visualizations.title: Sieve of Eratosthenes (2 to 21)
visualizations.description: Watch the sieve algorithm in action as we identify primes by filtering out multiples of 2 and 3.
